content: MEI revenue limit crisis: R$81,000/year limit. In 2024, 570,000+ MEIs were desenquadrados (disqualified) for exceeding this - 30x more than 2023 due to Receita Federal cross-referencing NF-e, card machines, e-Financeira, and marketplace data. Consequences: up to 20% over (up to R$97,200) = complementary DAS payment, desenquadramento next year. Over 20% = immediate retroactive desenquadramento, taxes recalculated at Simples Nacional rates, 0.33%/day fine (capped 20%), Selic interest. This is the #1 surprise cost for growing MEIs. Alert system is the critical differentiator: proactive warnings at 70%, 90%, 100% of limit prevent this disaster.
